sentiment: The invisible forces that shape our world — gravity, radio waves, ambition — are all the same kind of reaching.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI, accuses ex-employees of stealing trade secrets
stories.summary: Apple files suit against OpenAI, alleging former employees carried proprietary knowledge to the AI giant — ambition reaching across corporate boundaries.

stories.title: QuadRF can spot drones and see WiFi through my wall
stories.summary: A hobbyist RF rig reveals what radio waves already know: walls are suggestions, and every room is transparent to the right frequency.

stories.title: Einstein's relativity rules chemical bonds in heavy elements, new research shows
stories.summary: Relativity isn't just for black holes — at the atomic scale, the speed of electrons quietly shapes which elements can bond and how.
